title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 269.145 - Disposal, time limitation
text:
269.145.  Disposal, time limitation. — No dead animal may remain at an unrefrigerated substation or a series of unrefrigerated substations for a period of more than forty-eight hours.  All dead animals entering a substation in this state shall be disposed of according to the provisions of this chapter, taken to an authorized disposal facility, or permanently removed from the state within the above-mentioned time.
(L. 1992 H.B. 878)
